scripts.dev: npm run dev:db && wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5433 && npm run prisma:generate -w apps/api && npm run prisma:deploy && npm run seed && concurrently -k -n api,web,bot -c blue,green,yellow "npm:dev:api" "npm:dev:web" "npm:dev:bot"
scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/bot
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/bot
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
